title: pombalia rivalis
side_effects: Pombalia rivalis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, which may manifest as hives, itching, or difficulty breathing. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, improper use of Pombalia rivalis may cause interactions with other medications, potentially resulting in adverse effects like increased blood pressure or irregular heartbeats. Furthermore, pregnant or breastfeeding women may experience complications, such as miscarriage or birth defects, if they use Pombalia rivalis without proper guidance.
